creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
One more thing: I see darktable(1) depends directly or indirectly on two OpenMP implementations:

    libomp.so => /usr/local/llvm37/lib/libomp.so (0x800a49000)
    ...
    libgomp.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/gcc48/libgomp.so.1 (0x81337a000)

Could you please post the output of:

    ldd -a /usr/local/bin/darktable

This command will show which library pulls in gcc's OpenMP library.
